generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab"
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User-facing entity including 3D Visualization and Control Panel components"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages data processing and control mechanisms for the Digital Twin"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles resource-specific functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance ACCSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors (speed, steering angle)"
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor state sensor (e.g., current, speed)"
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo sensor (position, torque)"
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor,
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor,
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters (speed, steering angle) transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance MotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor,
    base:desc "Motor control data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor,
    base:desc "Steering servo control data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance VehicleStateDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state data"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of projected driving paths"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of detected object tracks"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected lead vehicle position and speed for ACC"
]

instance DesiredSpeedComputedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated target speed for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SaveDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save vehicle data to storage",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate operational reports from collected data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send vehicle actuation commands for speed regulation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for ACC system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data display, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, and report generation capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateDataInsight, ProjectedPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight, SaveDataAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system's lead vehicle detection, desired speed computation, and actuation control to cloud resources",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectedInsight, DesiredSpeedComputedInsight, ActuationControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point clouds into object tracks using DBSCAN and Kalman filter",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation for serialization, message alignment, and unit conversion",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time processing of object tracks and vehicle state parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for ACC system tasks",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and development of ACC models",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote control operations via network communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance LidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters (speed, steering angle)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor control data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo control data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from LiDAR data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured storage for vehicle state data and object tracks"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm and Kalman filter for object trajectory prediction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCComponentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control component for vehicle speed regulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the ACC Controlling FE are serialized and translated by the Data Translation component before transmission over Wi-Fi using UDP to physical actuators (Motor and Steering Servo). The document does not specify command validation, authentication, or feedback mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms is required for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as constrained by hardware limitations; this is less stringent than safety-critical vehicular standards which mandate synchronization better than 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 RA-based architecture mapping software components to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes. Entities include User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (resource-specific functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), which replaces the standard OME, impacting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-digital twin software component communication uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication between physical and digital entities occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer protocol. Bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements (Part 3), and Information exchange (Part 4). The reference architecture defines entities such as Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Information exchange standards specify interoperability protocols, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as a relevant technology for data collection and device control implementation."
]
